title: pelargonium × polytrichum
intro: Pelargonium × polytrichum, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family, characterized by its fragrant, pink to white flowers and a distinctive rose-like scent. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. Rose Geranium is said to offer numerous health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and alleviating menstrual cramps, due to its balancing effects on the body's hormonal system. Herbal preparations of Rose Geranium, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
